mnemonics: Myers' ANOVA: Always Note Variations (in) Observations Rigorously
Remember H. Myers: He Models Your Experimental Responses Statistically
keyPoints: Pioneer in the development of response surface methodology (RSM)
Emphasized the importance of experimental design for building empirical models
His work is foundational for optimizing processes and products in industry
commonMistakes: Confusing Myers' contributions to RSM with the more general theory of ANOVA developed by Fisher
Assuming ANOVA and RSM are the same thing; RSM is an application of ANOVA and other techniques for optimization
